title: deutzia × candelabrum f. erecta
intro: Deutzia × candelabrum f. erecta, also known as the candelabra deutzia, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Hydrangeaceae family. The medicinal properties of Deutzia × candelabrum f. erecta are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, treat gastrointestinal issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Deutzia × candelabrum f. erecta can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
